component.name: Prisma4Postgres
component.summary: PostgreSQL explorer and Prisma ORM integration

description.p: Prisma4Postgres is a standalone Electron desktop application for exploring and managing PostgreSQL databases. No VS Code required, no CLI wrappers, no config files — just connect and explore.

ul.li: Tree view of schemas, tables, views, and functions with column details
Monaco SQL editor with syntax highlighting and live autocomplete
Multi-tab queries with Ctrl+Enter to run
EXPLAIN plan viewer with cost and timing annotations
Full DDL viewer, index inspector, and FK map
Visual table creator — define columns with a GUI, no SQL required
Copy/export results as CSV, JSON, or Markdown
Prisma model generator — copy a model {} block for any table

description.p: Initial stable release. Fully standalone Electron app with all core features.
